data.body: S7 (docs) review PASSED round 3 (crisp oracles) + CLAIMED. Applied docs/mcp-auth.md (5 verifier modes, composite choke point, transport hardening, behind-proxy, interactive-client paths) + ADR 0050 + docs/README.md link. All AC proving commands pass, docs-index gate + ref/manifest drift gates green, make lint clean. Pushed change 727. Re-closing S6 (docs/mcp-auth.md now documents auth_custom_import in HEAD).
